fields.name: Phone Portrait
fields.pyxel_script:
def draw():
    pyxel.cls(1)
    pyxel.rectb(0, 0, pyxel.width, pyxel.height, 7)
    pyxel.text(8, 8, 'Phone viewport', 10)

fields.name: PiP Landscape
fields.pyxel_script:
def draw():
    pyxel.cls(0)
    pyxel.rect(0, 0, pyxel.width, pyxel.height, 13)
    pyxel.text(8, 8, 'PiP viewport', 7)
